name: bash
description: Execute shell commands directly in bash.

name: submit
description: Submit the final optimized implementation and complete the task. Use this when you are satisfied with your optimization results. After calling this, you cannot continue working on the task.

summary.description: Summary of the optimizations made and their performance impact.

name: str_replace_editor
description: File editor for viewing, creating, and editing files. Commands: view (view file content), create (create new file), str_replace (replace text), insert (insert text at line).

view_range.description: Line range [start, end] to view. Optional for: view.

old_str.description: Text to be replaced. Required for: str_replace.

new_str.description: Replacement text. Required for: str_replace, insert.

insert_line.description: Line number to insert at. Required for: insert.

name: rag_query
description: Search the GPU/ROCm/HIP knowledge base for relevant information. Use this when you need architecture-specific optimization guidance, API references, or best practices for AMD GPU programming.

topic.description: Search query describing the information you need. Be specific: include GPU model, APIs, data types, and optimization goals.

top_k.description: Number of results to return (default: from server config).

name: rag_optimize
description: Retrieve optimization suggestions for GPU kernels from the knowledge base. Use this when you need specific optimization tips for a kernel type on a target GPU.

code_type.description: Type of code/kernel to optimize (e.g. 'matrix multiplication', 'convolution', 'attention').

context.description: Additional context about the optimization goal.

top_k.description: Number of results to return (default: from server config).
